title: Gradient Descent Algorithm
description: Iterative optimization method for finding minima
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start: Define Problem and Cost Function J(θ)] --> B1["Initialize Parameters θ (e.g., randomly)"] B1 --> C1[Define Learning Rate α] C1 --> D1["Set Tolerance ε (Stopping Criterion)"] D1 --> E1{{"Calculate Gradient: ∇J(θ)"}} E1 --> F1[Update Parameters: θ := θ - α * ∇J(θ)] F1 --> G1["Calculate New Cost: J(θ)"] G1 --> H1{{"|J(θ_new) - J(θ_old)| < ε ?"/}} H1 -- Yes --> I1[Optimal Parameters θ: Minimum found] H1 -- No --> J1{{"Maximum Iterations Reached?"/}} J1 -- Yes --> K1[Return Best θ found so far] J1 -- No --> L1(θ_old = θ_new) L1 --> M1["J(θ_old) = J(θ_new)"] M1 --> E1 I1 --> N1[End] K1 --> N1 classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff classDef blue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff classDef purple fill:#b197fc,color:#fff style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style C1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style D1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style H1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style I1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff style J1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style K1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff style L1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff style M1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
